overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a sunlit fantasy palace with ornate stone architecture. The character ascends multiple staircases and walks along terraces offering panoramic views of a distant lake and valley, showcasing gothic arches, statues, and manicured gardens.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the sunlit courtyard toward a stone staircase flanked by purple flowering bushes

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the backdrop of the courtyard
large ornamental planters with vibrant purple flowering shrubs
wide stone staircase ascending between cliff walls
ornate stone entrance to the palace building with columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit palace courtyard with cobblestone paving. Geralt walks forward toward a stone staircase, passing large planters with purple flowering bushes. A tall stone cliff wall rises on the left while an ornate palace entrance is visible to the right.

events.description: entering the stone stairway between cliff walls and leaving the courtyard
emerging from shadow into bright sunlight as the terrace comes into view

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the wide stone stairs upward between stone walls

entered.detail: stone railing with arched openings overlooking the valley
tall narrow evergreen tree growing alongside the stairs

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the stone staircase flanked by cliff walls, transitioning from the enclosed courtyard to an open terrace. The camera moves upward through alternating light and shadow until breaking into full sunlight where a stone balustrade and distant valley view become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace with scenic valley overlook

events.description: reaching the upper terrace with panoramic view of the lake and distant town below
slowing pace to approach the balustrade and observe the scenic overlook

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the terrace and pausing to look out over the scenic valley and lake

entered.detail: tall stone statue of a winged figure on a pedestal
expansive blue lake visible in the valley below
distant mountains framing the horizon beyond the lake
tall pointed spire of the palace rising against the sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunlit terrace, Geralt passes stone statues and benches while enjoying a panoramic view of the valley lake and distant mountains. The stone balustrade runs along the right side, offering views of the landscape below, while gothic spires rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase with landscaped greenery

events.description: turning left to ascend the curved staircase toward the upper palace level
approaching the ornate colonnade with gothic arches at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning left and climbing the curved stone stairs flanked by manicured hedges and greenery

entered.detail: sweeping curved staircase ascending to the upper level
manicured green bushes lining the staircase
ornate gothic archway entrance to the upper colonnade

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left to ascend a curved stone staircase lined with manicured hedges and greenery. The path climbs toward an ornate stone archway and colonnade, with the gothic spire now centered in the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate palace colonnade with gothic arches

events.description: entering the ornate colonnade with tall gothic arches and columns

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the sunlit colonnade with ornate stone columns and arches

entered.detail: tall ornate gothic arches forming the colonnade structure
row of carved stone pillars supporting the arches
row of carved stone pillars along the right side
decorative stone railing with intricate carvings overlooking the valley

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through an ornate colonnade with tall gothic arches and stone columns. The polished marble floor reflects the bright sunlight as the terrace offers views through the arches to the mountains and valley beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit palace complex, transitioning from an enclosed courtyard to an expansive, elevated colonnade. It begins with Geralt walking across cobblestone paving past purple flowering bushes, moving toward a stone staircase flanked by a towering cliff wall. As he ascends the stairs, the camera moves through alternating light and shadow before breaking into full sunlight on an open terrace overlooking a distant valley lake and mountains. The scene then shifts as Geralt passes stone statues and benches along a balustrade, before turning left to climb a curved staircase lined with manicured hedges. Finally, the path leads through an ornate colonnade of tall gothic arches and polished marble floors that reflect the bright light and frame the panoramic landscape beyond.
